columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
columns.extraction_plan: The study reports on "newly diagnosed" patients, which is synonymous with synchronous metastases. This is stated in the text in Chunk 5 on page 3: "94% newly-diagnosed" and in Chunk 6 on page 4: "For this comparison in STAMPEDE, eligible patients had metastatic prostate cancer that was newly-diagnosed or relapsing after previous local therapy". Also, in Chunk 7 on page 10: "Most patients in STAMPEDE had de novo metastatic disease".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
columns.extraction_plan: The study reports on "relapsing" patients, which indicates metachronous disease. This is stated in Table 1 (Chunk 0) on page 5 under "Eligibility category": "Relapsing" (5% in SOC-alone, 7% in SOC + AAP, 6% overall).
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
columns.extraction_plan: The study reports results by "high-risk" metastatic disease group, which is defined using criteria (≥3 bone metastases; visceral metastases; Gleason score ≥8) that indicate high volume/burden. This is found in Table 3 (Chunk 3) on page 8, which presents "Primary and Secondary outcomes, by metastatic disease risk group using LATITUDE criteria" for the "High-risk" group. The definition is in Chunk 6 on page 4: "high-risk disease defined as at least two of: ≥3 bone metastases; visceral metastases; Gleason score ≥8."
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
columns.extraction_plan: The study reports results by "low-risk" metastatic disease group, which is defined using criteria that indicate low volume/burden. This is found in Table 3 (Chunk 3) on page 8, which presents "Primary and Secondary outcomes, by metastatic disease risk group using LATITUDE criteria" for the "Low-risk" group. The definition is in Chunk 6 on page 4: "high-risk disease defined as at least two of: ≥3 bone metastases; visceral metastases; Gleason score ≥8." (implying low-risk is less than these criteria).
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
